GetCdsPrice.storageType: CDS disk storage type: enhanced_ssd_pl0, enhanced_ssd_pl1, enhanced_ssd_pl2, enhanced_ssd_pl3, cloud_hp1/premium_ssd (general-purpose SSD), hp1/ssd (high-performance cloud disk), and elastic_ephemeral_disk (elastic ephemeral disk standard); default is hp1.
GetCdsPrice.purchaseCount: Total price for any number of CDS disks; must be a positive integer; optional, default is 1
GetCdsPrice.cdsExtraIo: Additional I/O performance purchase supported for enhanced_ssd_pl1, enhanced_ssd_pl2, and enhanced_ssd_pl3
